description: Fired when a user successfully signs in with email and password
Fired when a login attempt fails, with the error message
Fired when a user successfully creates a new account, includes role (user/admin)
Fired when a visitor submits the inquiry form on a property detail page
Fired when a user performs a search on the blogs listing page, includes location and category filters
Fired when a visitor submits the contact sales form
Fired when an admin successfully publishes a new property listing
Fired when an admin successfully publishes a new blog post/property article
Fired when a visitor clicks the legal document download link on a blog detail page
Fired when a visitor clicks the MP Bhulekh land records link on a blog detail page
